title: Importing users from gmail or outlook contacts
excerpt: Advanced option is missing under invite users to monday account for enterprise user. could you please tell me how we can enable it?

posts.author: girish.shenoy (Girish Shenoy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Advanced option is missing under invite users to monday account for enterprise user. could you please tell me how we can enable it?

image582×618 26.5 KB

posts.author: Bill_In_Ohio (Bill Duncan)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a good question @girish.shenoy , as we might be exploring utilization on a broader basis. Integration with Active Directory would be great, but the ability to send an invitation to view contents en masse would be great, and I was wondering if you ever received an answer back on this.
